description: Negative/error-path: reconnect result.actions[] contains only action envelopes, not root/sessionAdded or auth/required frames. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: reconnect.replay.edge.notifications-not-replayed. Protocol notifications (auth/required, root/sessionAdded, etc.) are ephemeral and MUST NOT appear in the reconnect replay.

steps.label: send reconnect to trigger the error condition
